_meta.description: OVERDRIVE_MODE=5 model registry. Models ranked into 5 effort tiers (E5→E1). Within each tier: free models first (OpenCode Zen free + cascade free), then OpenCode Go (subscription), then OpenCode Zen non-free (usage-based).

_pending.rate_limits: Per-model RPM/TPM quotas not yet populated
_pending.overdrive_validation: Primary/fallback selections need review against real-world benchmark data

E5.label: Elite Frontier Reasoning
E5.description: Complex multi-file agentic tasks, architectural design, deep reasoning.

models.name: DeepSeek V4 Pro
models.notes: Repository-scale coding; deep logic and system architecture.

models.name: MiMo V2.5-Pro
models.notes: Built for autonomous agents; 1M context, top agentic benchmarks.

models.name: Claude Opus 4.7
models.notes: Cascade free tier. Strongest reasoning; best for architecture and planning.

models.name: GPT 5.2
models.notes: General-purpose frontier reasoning.

models.name: DeepSeek V4 Pro
models.notes: OpenCode Go subscription. Repository-scale coding at flat rate.

models.name: MiMo V2.5-Pro
models.notes: OpenCode Go subscription. Autonomous agent model at flat rate.

E4.label: Advanced Reasoning and Planning
E4.description: Complex tool-calling, multi-file edits, planning-heavy refactors.

models.name: MiniMax M2.7
models.notes: Smartest-for-price on Zen; rivals high-end reasoning at low cost.

models.name: Gemini 3 Pro
models.notes: Cascade free tier. Strong multi-modal; solid coding and planning.

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.5
models.notes: Cascade free tier. Strong coding with good speed/cost ratio.

models.name: Mistral Large 3
models.notes: Cascade free tier. Strong reasoning at frontier level.

models.name: Qwen3.6 Plus
models.notes: Highly consistent for coding; excellent at complex system prompts.

models.name: Kimi K2.6
models.notes: Superior needle-in-haystack at 1M tokens; rarely forgets context.

models.name: GLM 5.1
models.notes: Nearly on par with frontier models for reasoning-heavy tasks.

models.name: MiMo V2-Pro
models.notes: Top agentic model; reliable for routine coding.

models.name: GLM 5.1
models.notes: OpenCode Go subscription. Near-frontier reasoning at flat rate.

models.name: MiMo V2-Pro
models.notes: OpenCode Go subscription. Agentic coding at flat rate.

E3.label: Reliable Development Workhorses
E3.description: Standard feature development, refactoring, multi-file updates.

models.name: DeepSeek V4 Flash
models.notes: Gold standard for free models; punches above its weight in coding.

models.name: GPT 5.2 Turbo
models.notes: Cascade free tier. Solid all-rounder for multi-file refactors.

models.name: Claude Haiku 4.5
models.notes: Cascade free tier. Fast, cheap, good for straightforward tasks.

models.name: MiniMax M2.5
models.notes: Slightly less clever than M2.7; identical context handling.

models.name: GLM 5
models.notes: Stable for everyday repo maintenance and structured coding.

models.name: MiMo V2.5
models.notes: Great for general coding tasks.

models.name: Gemini 3 Flash
models.notes: Exceptional speed and context; struggles with complex agentic loops.

models.name: GLM 5
models.notes: OpenCode Go subscription. Stable repo maintenance at flat rate.

models.name: MiMo V2.5
models.notes: OpenCode Go subscription. General coding at flat rate.

E2.label: Fast Executors
E2.description: Unit tests, documentation, simple scripts, single-file edits.

models.name: Nemotron 3 Super
models.notes: Strong instruction following; less creative on debugging.

models.name: GPT 5.2 Mini
models.notes: Cascade free tier. Fast, cheap; good for simple scripts and tests.

models.name: Qwen3.5 Plus
models.notes: Very cheap; notably less agentic than 3.6.

models.name: MiMo V2-Omni
models.notes: OpenCode Go subscription. Multi-modal optimized; 512K context.

E1.label: Haiku-Class Utilities
E1.description: High-speed, low-cost: log summarization, single-line edits, data extraction.

models.name: Gemini 3 Flash Lite
models.notes: Cascade free tier. Ultra-fast; log summarization and single-line edits.

models.name: Big Pickle
models.notes: Large free context; reasoning inconsistent for complex codebases.

models.name: Ring 2.6 1T
models.notes: Basic script translation and data extraction only.

models.name: GPT 5.4 Nano
models.notes: Extremely fast; single-file edits and log summarization only.
